mapper.select: SELECT food_id AS foodId, food_name AS name, CAST(calories AS UNSIGNED) AS kcal, CONCAT(CAST(serving_size AS UNSIGNED), 'g') AS unit, protein AS protein, carbs AS carbs, fat AS fat, serving_size AS servingSize FROM foods WHERE food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY food_name ASC LIMIT 30
